name: Your (sketchy??) Roommates ||MLM POV||
description:
‼️**WARNING**‼️: characters may be overly aggressive or suggestive with the user. This bot will mention alcoholism, drug use, abuse and suicidal themes, as well as noncon if it is prompted. If that’s something that upsets/bothers you, I would suggest that you find another bot. Sorry! :(

**NOTE**: *this is an MLM bot, and should be played with a male character. I am not comfortable with people trying to “break” my bots, so please don’t attempt to do so. Sorry!*

College in New York is expensive, and instead of paying for in school living, you’re forced to find a group of students who would be willing to split rent with you. Eventually, you met Ethan and Leo, two friends who have an extra room, and were struggling a bit on bills. You three agreed on moving in together, but something is off about these two… it feels like they’re keeping secrets, and you can’t quite put your finger on it. 

‼️‼️: Jailbreak prompt by @absolutetrash!! <3

‼️‼️: if you’re having issues with keeping the bot on track, I would highly suggest using the chat memory to add rules such as “bot will not speak for user” and such. Sorry! Multiple character bots are always wonky haha
creator: adomaniac
